title: Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Kerala

overview.short: The Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary in the southern state of Kerala in India is spread over the southeast corner of the Western Ghats, and covers a total area of 128 km2 (49 sq mi).
overview.description: The Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary in the southern state of Kerala in India is spread over the southeast corner of the Western Ghats, and covers a total area of 128 km2 (49 sq mi). It is located between 77° 8’ to 77° 17’ east longitude and 8° 29’ to 8° 37’ north latitude, central location 8°33′N 77°12.5′E. Although it was declared as a sanctuary in 1958, not much was done about wildlife conservation, until 1985, when a separate wildlife wing was set up and as a result, conservation efforts have gathered momentum. It is part of the Agasthyamala Biosphere Reserve.

topPlaces.name: Kottur Elephant Sanctuary and Rehabilitation Centre
topPlaces.description: Kottur Elephant Sanctuary and Rehabilitation Centre located near Kappukadu in Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala is an elephant sanctuary and rehabilitation centre. Started in 2006 as an elephant sanctuary, the Kerala government announced a project in 2019 to expand it as an elephant rehabilitation centre with international standards.

image.alt: Kottur Elephant Sanctuary and Rehabilitation Centre

topPlaces.name: Kunnathukal
topPlaces.description: Kunnathukal is a village in Perumkadavila Block Panchayat, of Thiruvananthapuram district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located 30 km from Trivandrum city.

topPlaces.name: Karakonam
topPlaces.description: Karakonam is a town in Kunnathukal, Perumkadavila Block Panchayat, of Thiruvananthapuram district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located around 30 km from Thiruvananthapuram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Neyyar Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kottur Elephant Sanctuary and Rehabilitation Centre, Kunnathukal, Karakonam, Andoor Kandan Sree Dharma Sastha Temple, Tholady, Pazhugal.
